steps.title: Set up the proportion
steps.content: Since the ratio 140 to $m$ is equivalent to the ratio 4 to 28, we can write: $$\frac{140}{m} = \frac{4}{28}$$

steps.title: Simplify and solve
steps.content:
Simplify the right side: $\frac{4}{28} = \frac{1}{7}$

So $\frac{140}{m} = \frac{1}{7}$. Cross-multiplying gives $140 \cdot 7 = m$, therefore $m = 980$.
